query: Muskoka Loppet cross country ski race Arrowhead Provincial Park

videos.title: Arrowhead Nordic Ski Club hosts the Muskoka Loppet - Georgian Nordic
videos.description: Arrowhead Nordic Ski Club hosts the Muskoka Loppet in the breathtaking Arrowhead Provincial Park.  Georgian Nordic Ski Club from Parry Sound had several participates including 5km, 15km, and 30km skiers.  Absolutely beautiful day for a ski.
tags: Georgian Nordic Ski and Canoe Club

videos.title: Muskoka Loppet 2012.mp4
videos.description: This years Muskoka Loppet. Taking place at Arrowhead Provincial Park. It features a 5k, 15k and 30k xcountry ski race, winding through some of Muskoka's most beautiful scenery. Located just north of Huntsville, Ontario. Arrowhead is becoming famous for it's cross country ski trails.

videos.title: Muskoka Loppet 2012 start 30km
videos.description:
This is the start of the 30km race (men and women)
 for the 2012 Muskoka Loppet at Arrowhead Provincial Park
(just outside Huntsville, Ontario).

videos.title: Arrowhead Provincial Park Amphitheatre video presentation Muskoka Loppett 2009
videos.description: Muskoka Loppett video edited to be presented at the Arrowhead Provincial Park Amphitheatre this summer.  Video will play prior to the scheduled Wednesday and Saturday evening show.  Tried to show the youth participation and that families watching can see that this event is for families and competitiors as well.  The Loppett is a annual event that I have shot to be used by Arrowhead and the Ontario Youth Winter Games being held at Arrowhead Provincial Park January 2010 Crosscountry Venue. The competition is an earlier event because some competitors will be competing at the Vancouver 2010 Winter Olympics in Feburary.  A longer 29 minute DVD has been accepted by the Government of Canada to be considered for a 2010 Olympic Venue Presentation of Muskoka home of the 2010 G8 Summit.

videos.title: Ontario 2010 Youth Muskoka Winter Games Nordic XC January 17 2010 Arrowhead
videos.description: The Ontario Youth Winter Games with the CrossCountry Classic race in 7.5 race.  Teams from all over Ontario competed at these Provincial races and ages from 14 to 17 years.  Arrowhead Provincial Park the host venue with excellent snow and ski conditions.

videos.title: 2025 Muskoka Loppet   HD 1080p
videos.description: The Muskoka Loppet, hosted by the Arrowhead Nordic Ski Club, was held on Sunday, January 26th. About 300 skiers participated and upwards of 40 volunteers made it all happen. Skiers from less than ten to more than 80 in age challenged themselves.
